response:
Emily started with 25 dogs, added 4 puppies on Thursday, and 1 stray on Friday, bringing the total to 30 dogs before the adoptions. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, which means 6 dogs left the center, leaving her with 24 dogs currently. The rescue is located at [address] and operates under the name [name] with a contact number of [phone].

The daily log shows the intake was recorded in [file] while the adoption papers were signed in [book]. Emily plans to update the [website] to reflect the new count of 24 dogs in her care. Please ensure all records are stored in the [folder] for future reference. *** The final count is confirmed in the [report] generated at the end of the week.
